name: Turkey Casserole a La Sams
recipeIngredient: 1 pound turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
12 ounces no-yolks noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice turkey and set aside.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan, mix flour, evaporated skimmed milk, dried vegetables, carrots, mushrooms, and turkey gravy mix. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
3. Cook and drain the noodles. Mix with turkey and sauce.
4. Mix bread crumbs, garlic salt, and parmesan cheese.
5. Top casserole with the parmesan cheese and bread crumb mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until the top turns golden brown.
